about: Monkey Mart is a popular idle supermarket simulation where you play as a hardworking monkey running your own grocery store. Harvest fresh bananas, stock shelves, serve customers and unlock new product aisles as your business grows.
Play Monkey Mart free on MonkeyMart.one — no download or account required. Works on desktop, tablet and mobile browsers. When you're done stocking bananas, browse 500+ more free games on our site.
howToPlay: Move your monkey with WASD or arrow keys (tap to move on mobile).
Walk to the banana patch, harvest fruit, then carry it to the shelf.
Customers pick up items automatically — keep shelves stocked to earn coins.
Spend coins on new aisles, helper monkeys and upgrades to expand your mart.
Unlock new products and zones as you progress through busier levels.

faq.q: Is Monkey Mart free to play?
faq.a: Yes. Monkey Mart is 100% free on MonkeyMart.one with no download required.

faq.q: Can I play Monkey Mart on mobile?
faq.a: Yes. The game runs in mobile browsers — tap to move and interact with your store.

faq.a: Monkey Mart is a casual idle management sim: harvest, stock shelves, serve customers and expand your supermarket.
